docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-17-2018 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,000.00 FILED BY MORVANT, JACOB AS TO DEFENDANT WHELAN, GRETCHEN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-17-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "UNCLAIMED" COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNSERVED AS TO DEFENDANT WHELAN, GRETCHEN
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM COMMISSIONER FILED BY MORVANT, JACOB
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF MORVANT, JACOB AS TO DEFENDANT WHELAN, GRETCHEN

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-17-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-17-2018 BY JUDGE PRO TEM SAM LAW. 506. PLAINTIFF JACOB MORVANT IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT GRETCHEN WHELAN IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: SAM LAW; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MORVANT, JACOB RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WHELAN, GRETCHEN $2,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,090.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 01/19/18. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - INSUFFICIENT ADDRESS - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF MORVANT, JACOB
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE: NO FEE) SERVED DEC-07-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT WHELAN, GRETCHEN
